mapper.select: SELECT n.notification_id, n.user_id, n.sender_id, n.group_id, g.group_name AS groupName, gm.group_nickname AS groupNickname, n.type, n.target_id, n.message, n.is_read, n.created_at FROM notifications n LEFT JOIN user_groups g ON g.group_id = n.group_id LEFT JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = n.group_id AND gm.user_id = n.sender_id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, sender_id, group_id, type, target_id, message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{senderId}, #{groupId}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{message})
